summary: The diff modifies component files (AboutSection.tsx and Navbar.tsx) to reference the source image directly via `/assets/quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg` instead of saving a new 512×512 PNG at `frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png`. The static asset replacement required by REQ-11 was not performed, and component code was modified contrary to the constraint of not modifying any component code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the new gaming artwork image as frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing file, cropped/resized to exactly 512x512 pixels.
missing_requirements.reason: No new file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png. The diff shows zero added files, and the components were changed to reference `/assets/quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg` directly instead of the required static asset path.

hallucinated_features.description: Component code was modified in Navbar.tsx and AboutSection.tsx to change the image src to the raw uploaded filename `/assets/quality_restoration_20260128182709920-1.jpg`.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not modify any component code — only replace the static asset file.' Both Navbar.tsx and AboutSection.tsx were modified, which violates this constraint.
